mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_message (session_id, message_role, message_text, cited_chunk_ids, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{messageRole}, #{messageText}, #{citedChunkIds}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, message_role, message_text, cited_chunk_ids, create_time FROM ai_agent_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
